dataPageMetaDescription: Downloadable CNC and manufacturing benchmark datasets for research, validation and industrial cost modeling.
dataPageLead: SectorCalc publishes traceable industrial benchmark data for academic citation and shop-floor validation.
datasetCncDescription: Representative CNC machining cost benchmark — cutting speed, feed rate, tool life, cycle time and job cost (24 verified sample rows).
datasetLicenseNote: Licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC BY 4.0)
aboutAdvisoryBoardLead: SectorCalc calculators are informed by methodologies from internationally recognized industrial mathematics authorities.
teamWilMetaTitle: Prof. Dr. Wil Schilders — ECMI President
teamWilMetaDescription: Profile of Prof. Dr. Wil Schilders, ECMI President and industrial mathematics authority cited on SectorCalc guides.
teamWilBio: Wil Schilders is President of the European Consortium for Mathematics in Industry (ECMI) and a leading authority on industrial mathematics, numerical methods and manufacturing decision models.
teamCarstenMetaTitle: Prof. Dr. Carsten Carstensen — Humboldt University of Berlin
teamCarstenMetaDescription: Profile of Prof. Dr. Carsten Carstensen, numerical analysis authority and SectorCalc academic advisor.
teamCarstenBio: Prof. Dr. Carsten Carstensen is affiliated with Humboldt University of Berlin. His work spans numerical analysis, adaptive finite element methods and reliable computation for applied engineering models. He serves on the SectorCalc academic advisory board.
teamRogerMetaTitle: Prof. Roger Fletcher — University of Dundee
teamRogerMetaDescription: Profile of Prof. Roger Fletcher, optimization pioneer and SectorCalc methodology reviewer.
teamRogerBio: Prof. Roger Fletcher was a leading authority in nonlinear optimization and published foundational methods used across engineering and operations research. His work informs the optimization discipline behind SectorCalc decision models.
teamCarolMetaTitle: Dr. Carol S. Woodward — SIAM President
teamCarolMetaDescription: Profile of Dr. Carol S. Woodward, SIAM President and SectorCalc academic advisor.
teamCarolBio: Dr. Carol S. Woodward is affiliated with Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory and serves as SIAM President. Her research focuses on time integration, nonlinear solvers and large-scale scientific computing for industrial and national-lab applications.
